title: Shenanigans & Pie
description: A kitchen sink pack designed to give a broad and varied modded experience without locking players into any one specific track.
body:
Shenanigans & Pie is a 1.20.1 kitchen sink pack for Forge designed to give a broad and varied modded experience without locking players into any one specific track. It aims to be a gentle introduction into modded Minecraft for those with only vanilla experience, while providing plenty of content for those who are. There is a large focus on technology, farming, decorative building, exploration and combat while adding visual enhancements, UI overhauls, and optimizations.

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>
  
- More realistic worldgen
- Overhauls to vanilla structures
- More structures and biomes to explore
- A new dimension to conqueror
- New bosses in the Overworld, Nether, and End
- Backpacks
- Better Combat
- Guns
- More vegetables to grow
- More foods to make
- High Tech machines
- Magic
- UI Tweaks
- Better animations
- Shader support
- No quests or goalposts to dictate your own experience
- Ingame voice chat
- Multiplayer teams
- More Dungeons
- Ships
- Flying machines
- And many more! 

</details>



<details>

- [Silent Gear](https://modrinth.com/mod/silent-gear) by [SilentChaos512](https://modrinth.com/user/SilentChaos512) (Tools)

Shenanigans & Pie can be played either singleplayer or multiplayer, but has been designed primarily to be played on a server.
